Article.ArticleTitle: Growth and physiological regulations of discarded cocoa seed meal on mixed-bred rabbits in humid tropics.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Animal Science, Faculty of Agricultural Sciences, University of Nigeria, Nsukka, Enugu State, 410001, Nigeria. aliluke230@gmail.com.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethical approval: Sample collection and animal handling followed the guidelines of the Animal Experimentation Ethics Committee of the University of Nigeria, Nsukka (2013), under code 5.4.2 (Reference Number: UNN/C125ARO00.22.08.2024). All necessary precautions were taken to minimize discomfort and to ensure animal welfare. Consent to participate: Not applicable. Consent to publish: The authors granted permission to publish this paper in the Tropical Journal of Animal Health and Production under non-open access, with no payment of article processing charges (APC) by the authors. Competing interests: The authors have no competing interests to declare that are relevant to the content of this article.
